shadow.field:
// 全局状态
if (typeof motionData === 'undefined') {
 motionData = {
 circles: [],
 motions: [],
 colors: ['#fdfffc', '#235789', '#c1292e', '#f1d302', '#020100'],
 noiseData: null,
 width: 900,
 height: 900,
 initDone: false
 };
 
 // 生成不重叠圆圈（简化版）
 const md = motionData;
 for(let i = 0; i < 50; i++) { // 减少数量提升性能
 let attempts = 0;
 let circle;
 do {
 let d = md.width * (Math.random() * 0.1 + 0.05);
 let x = (md.width/2) + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.7 * md.width;
 let y = (md.height/2) + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.7 * md.height;
 circle = {x, y, d};
 attempts++;
 } while (attempts < 20 && md.circles.some(c => 
 Math.hypot(circle.x - c.x, circle.y - c.y) < (circle.d/2 + c.d/2)
 ));
 md.circles.push(circle);
 }
 
 // 初始化每个圆的Motion
 md.motions = md.circles.map(circle => ({
 x: circle.x, y: circle.y, d: circle.d,
 t: 0, te: Math.floor(Math.random() * 200 + 200),
 n: Math.floor(Math.random() * 11 + 4),
 sw: circle.d / 8, // 简化
 circles: [],
 cols: [],
 count: 0
 }));
 
 motionData.initDone = true;
}

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['motion_canvas'];
if(!canvasTex?.image) return;

const ctx = canvasTex.image.getContext("2d");
const md = motionData;
md.width = canvasTex.image.width;
md.height = canvasTex.image.height;

// 清屏
ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
ctx.fillRect(0, 0, md.width, md.height);

// 绘制每个Motion
md.motions.forEach((motion, motionIdx) => {
 ctx.save();
 ctx.translate(motion.x, motion.y);
 
 // 裁剪圆形区域
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(0, 0, motion.d/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 ctx.clip();
 
 // 绘制子圆圈动画
 motion.circles.forEach((circ, i) => {
 // 缓动动画
 let n = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, circ.t / motion.te));
 let eased = Math.sqrt(1 - Math.pow(1 - n, 2)); // easeOutCirc
 
 let currD = circ.d1 * eased;
 let currX = circ.x0 + (circ.x1 - circ.x0) * eased;
 let currY = circ.y0 + (circ.y1 - circ.y0) * eased;
 
 // 绘制彩色圆
 ctx.fillStyle = circ.col;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(currX, currY, currD/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 ctx.fill();
 
 circ.t++;
 if(circ.t > motion.te) {
 // 重新生成
 motion.count++;
 motion.circles[i] = newCircle(motion.d * 1.1, motion.te, 
 motion.cols[motion.count % motion.cols.length]);
 }
 });
 
 ctx.restore();
 
 // 更新时间
 motion.t++;
});

// 噪声叠加（简化版）
if(!md.noiseData) {
 md.noiseData = ctx.createImageData(md.width, md.height);
 let data = md.noiseData.data;
 for(let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
 let x = (i/4) % md.width;
 let y = Math.floor(i/4 / md.width);
 let noiseVal = (Math.sin(x*0.01) + Math.sin(y*0.01)) * 120 + 120;
 data[i] = data[i+1] = data[i+2] = noiseVal;
 data[i+3] = 30 + Math.random() * 50;
 }
}
ctx.putImageData(md.noiseData, 0, 0);

canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;

// 工具函数
function newCircle(d1, te, col) {
 let th = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
 let r = Math.random() * 0.5 * d1;
 return {
 x0: r * Math.cos(th),
 x1: 0,
 y0: r * Math.sin(th),
 y1: 0,
 d1: d1,
 t: 0,
 col: col || '#fdfffc'
 };
}
